content: [{"id":"PK8-YNrXKn","type":"header","data":{"text":" Gouvernance, Risques et Conformité (GRC)","col":12}},{"id":"vx9gYuERhc","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Ce module vous permet de piloter efficacement la conformité, les violations, les demandes de droits et les plans d'action au sein de vos entités et clients.","col":12}},{"id":"zOCZw0WdGF","type":"onboarding","data":{"onboarding_name":"Onboarding GRC","col":12}},{"id":"c-VxRjDSY4","type":"spacer","data":{"col":12}},{"id":"c5opHaxdN2","type":"number_card","data":{"number_card_name":"Nombre d'entreprises","col":3}},{"id":"1x48QByKOt","type":"number_card","data":{"number_card_name":"Plans d'action en cours","col":3}},{"id":"aTvA8uEfN8","type":"number_card","data":{"number_card_name":"violations enregistrées","col":3}},{"id":"F9T1MTcY_7","type":"number_card","data":{"number_card_name":"Fiches de traitement","col":3}},{"id":"kAsYverqU9","type":"card","data":{"card_name":" Conformité","col":4}},{"id":"RjEiLWwl5i","type":"card","data":{"card_name":"Demandes & Violations","col":4}},{"id":"F02jnAdXS_","type":"card","data":{"card_name":"Suivi & Avancement","col":4}},{"id":"ng4hE_7AQK","type":"card","data":{"card_name":"Clients & Organisation","col":4}},{"id":"dOgqe6_uXA","type":"card","data":{"card_name":"Gestion des documents","col":4}},{"id":"rp1_section","type":"spacer","data":{"col":12}},{"id":"rp2_header","type":"header","data":{"text":"Rapports & Analytiques","col":12}},{"id":"rp3_card","type":"card","data":{"card_name":"Rapports GRC","col":12}}]
